positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a mountain range vista under a vibrant, ethereal twilight sky. The foreground features clean, bold silhouettes of pine trees and various desert flora, designed for high contrast on apparel. The color palette utilizes deep indigo, burnt sienna, teal, and gold accents. Cinematic lighting suggests a rising sun through the peaks, casting dramatic, crisp shadows. Minimalist yet detailed line art combined with solid color blocking. Vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing, central composition, clean edges, highly detailed, pop art style.
